destinations.evidence: Mercury precompiles now include ONNX, ed25519, secp256r1, Nitro, JQ, HTTP/LLM/DKMS entries; the provider selects standard Ethereum precompiles before the Mercury/Cancun spec and keeps the removed Echo address unregistered.

equivalence_argument: Mapped in the nodebuilder precompile provider: the Mercury set includes the previously missing secp256r1 and Nitro entries, the provider delegates to standard Ethereum precompiles for pre-Mercury specs instead of unconditionally installing the Mercury set, and Echo remains absent.

related_but_insufficient_code: The original audit observed unconditional Mercury installation and missing secp256r1/Nitro registration. Local nodebuilder code now fixes those gaps.

rationale: The lineage shows a prototype Echo/ONNX provider, removal of Echo, replacement of a temporary Cancun gate by the Ritual Mercury hardfork gate, and consolidation of the production ONNX/signature/Nitro/JQ addresses into the current Mercury set.
statement: When RitualHardfork::Mercury is active for the current block and timestamp, the Ritual precompile provider extends the base Cancun set with the configured ONNX, ed25519, secp256r1, Nitro, and JQ entry points; before Mercury activation it delegates to standard Ethereum precompiles, and the former Echo test precompile at 0x999 is not registered.
suggested_falsification_tests: Instantiate mercury_precompiles() and assert it contains the ONNX, ed25519, secp256r1, Nitro, and JQ addresses while no entry exists for the former Echo address 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000999.
Select RitualPrecompiles for a pre-Mercury spec/context and assert Ritual-only addresses are absent; select a Mercury-active spec/context and assert ONNX/Ritual precompile addresses are present.
With Mercury active, assert address 0x9 dispatches to Ed25519, 0x100 dispatches to secp256r1, and 0x101 dispatches to Nitro rather than falling through as unknown precompiles.
summary: The Mercury precompile set and provider gating are mapped in the nodebuilder dependency.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Instantiate the nodebuilder precompile provider in a pre-Mercury context and at Mercury; assert pre-Mercury delegates to standard Ethereum precompiles, Mercury includes ONNX/ed25519/secp256r1/Nitro/JQ, and Echo 0x999 remains absent.
title: Mercury precompile set is hardfork-gated and excludes Echo
